name: harness-readiness-check
title: Harness Readiness Check
description: Probe the current AI harness, AIBridge CLI, workflow support, and optional Unity/Runtime capabilities before a long or delegated workflow.

taskKind.description: implementation, review, debug, validation, runtime, or workflow.

requiresUnity.description: Whether this task needs Unity compile, logs, assets, scenes, prefabs, or Inspector access.

requiresRuntime.description: Whether this task needs Runtime, Player, Play Mode, input, screenshot, perf, or handler evidence.

requiresCodeIndex.description: Whether this task needs semantic C# symbol/source navigation.

phases.description: Record harness rule files, Skill root, CLI path, and whether external agent/manual steps can run.

steps.description: Return EvidenceRef[] for RootRule, Skill root, CLI path, and external executor availability.

phases.description: Run deterministic workflow CLI checks that do not require Unity Editor or Runtime targets.

steps.description: Read the Unity-generated harness capability snapshot.
Validate the Runtime debug recipe template.

phases.description: Probe Unity, Code Index, Runtime, or sub-agent capability only when the task requires them.

steps.description: When required by inputs, run compile unity, get_logs, code_index status, runtime list_targets, or harness sub-agent checks and import CommandEvidence/EvidenceRef.

phases.description: Write the readiness matrix, fallback path, blocked capabilities, and next workflow recommendation.

steps.description: Generate a compact readiness report with available, degraded, unavailable, unknown, and not-needed states.

artifacts.description: Harness and optional capability evidence imported from the main agent or external executor.
Readiness matrix and recommended fallback path.
